title: Skulk Dimension
description: This Mod Adds New Dimension , structures and more!
body:
It is now a lie
||
\/

This mod adds a brand new Skulk Dimension, accessible by opening a portal inside Ancient Cities.

In the Skulk Dimension, elytra usage is disabled, making exploration more dangerous and grounded.

You can find Skulk Upgrade Trims in various structures. These are used to craft Skulk Armor.

Skulk Armor features:
Completely cancels all your sounds
When wearing the full set, your nametag becomes hidden
Includes a special armor trim that allows using an elytra while wearing Skulk Armor

⚠️ Warning: This mod is currently in early alpha. **If you are on version above 1.21 the game won't start**
It is not recommended for regular gameplay and may break your world or game.
Required mods:

Fabric API

Fabric Language Kotlin

The mod will become more playable in the near future.
Credits:
Textures by Mikomaniak — thank you!
I hope you enjoy the concept and stay tuned for future updates.
